headline: Consumer Tech News (March 23-27): Netflix & Sony Hikes Prices, OpenAI Flags Microsoft Dependency Risk & More
summary: Apple launches 13-inch MacBook Neo priced at $599 ($499 for students). Netflix hikes all streaming plan prices, Sony raises PlayStation hardware prices, Semiconductor stocks gain as U.S.-Iran talks ease tensions
